CustomField.description: If you want a custom "How to Apply" section on this development's page on the website, enter the pre-app button label here. Example: Submit a Cooper Towers Preliminary Application
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If you want a custom "How to Apply" section on this development's page on the website, enter the pre-app button label here. Example: Submit a Cooper Towers Preliminary Application
CustomField.label: Custom Pre-app Label
